en.text: "Perhaps this is yet another principle of therapeutic candor? Maybe the therapist should not share with the patient what causes a strong inner conflict within themselves. First, they should work through these problems in individual therapy. Otherwise, the patient will have to solve the therapist's problems"

de.text: "Vielleicht verbirgt sich darin ein weiteres Prinzip therapeutischer Offenheit? Andernfalls mГјsste der Patient die Probleme des Therapeuten lГ¶sen"
